item.description:
# Everything Clipboard 1.2.0
- Adds a more helpful first-run and empty-state experience. - Makes Quick Paste faster with better ranking, keyboard cues, and arrow-key selection. - Simplifies the default toolbar while keeping power actions available through customization. - Groups clipboard history by day and makes the detail pane more action-first. - Adds smart cleanup actions for common copied text tasks. - Keeps the bundle identifier, Sparkle signing key, Keychain items, preferences, and local clipboard data continuity unchanged.

# Everything Clipboard 1.1.0
- Keeps toolbar search open while typing. - Prevents background clipboard capture from bringing Everything Clipboard to the front. - Adds dark-mode control, default dark appearance, tabbed settings, Settings-window layout polish, and icon-and-text toolbar defaults. - Keeps the bundle identifier, Sparkle signing key, Keychain items, preferences, and local clipboard data continuity unchanged.

# Everything Clipboard 1.0.8
- Fixes selection for copied video and file items in the clipboard history list. - Keeps list-row clicks reliable by leaving media dragging in the selected item's detail preview. - Preserves the menu-bar update command and launch-time Sparkle background check. - Keeps the bundle identifier, Sparkle signing key, Keychain items, preferences, and local clipboard data continuity unchanged.
